item.description: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 51min This speech from our captain, Vincent Kompany to #ManCity fans in a pub immediately after winning the Premier League title, eight years ago today. 1:07 De The Sportsman 5 42 600 10 mil

item.title: BenCrellin: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 3h My anxiety levels are pretty high right now. I dreamt last night that I was trying to avoid
item.description: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 3h My anxiety levels are pretty high right now. I dreamt last night that I was trying to avoid being drafted into the army to fight in a World War! 14 4 116 37 mil

item.title: BenCrellin: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 1h En respuesta a @BenCrellin I think it was WW2 and not WW3 FWIW 1 8 5 mil
item.description: Ben Crellin @BenCrellin · 1h En respuesta a @BenCrellin I think it was WW2 and not WW3 FWIW 1 8 5 mil

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 1h #ManCity were crowned 2017/2018 Premier League CHAMPIONS, eight years ago today. De Premier
item.description: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 1h #ManCity were crowned 2017/2018 Premier League CHAMPIONS, eight years ago today. De Premier League 5 35 325 6 mil

item.title: LFC: Liverpool FC @LFC · 1h Our thoughts on this significant and poignant day, as always, are with all those affected by the
item.description: Liverpool FC @LFC · 1h Our thoughts on this significant and poignant day, as always, are with all those affected by the tragedy at Hillsborough and we pause in memory of the 97 fans who will never be forgotten. 104 878 3 mil 75 mil
